zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Lumley於1408年9月29日出生在英國諾圖波藍德莫普斯時，他的父親John Lumley 2nd Baron Lumley25歲，母親Felicia Redman39歲。他和Margaret Harrington至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1485年4月1日在英國達勒姆斯特勒-斯崔特享年76歲。

nameMeanings.name: Lumley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Lumley, a place in County Durham, so named from Old English lum(m) ‘pool’ (see Lum 1) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

variants.name: Lum
meanings: English: habitational name from Lumb in Lancashire. In some instances the name may be topographic for someone who lived by a pool, Middle English lum(m).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 林 (see   Lin   1) and 藍 (see   Lan   1), based on their Cantonese pronunciations.

variants.name: Lemley
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of English   Lumley  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Lumley was born on 29 September 1408, in Morpeth, Northumberland, England, his father, John Lumley 2nd Baron Lumley, was 25 and his mother, Felicia Redman, was 39. He had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Margaret Harrington. He died on 1 April 1485, in Chester-le-Street, Durham, England, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Lumley est né le 29 septembre 1408, à Morpeth, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, John Lumley 2nd Baron Lumley, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Felicia Redman, avait 39 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Margaret Harrington. Il est décédé le 1 avril 1485, à Chester-le-Street, Durham, Angleterre, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Lumley am 29. September 1408 in Morpeth, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Lumley 2nd Baron Lumley 25 und seine Mutter Felicia Redman 39. pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Lumley nasceu em 29 de setembro de 1408, em Morpeth, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Lumley 2nd Baron Lumley, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Felicia Redman, tinha 39 anos. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Margaret Harrington. Он умер 1 апреля 1485 г. в местности честир-ле-стрит, дурам, Англия в возрасте 76 лет.
